feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: #CoE#HSQC Create sales order for one time customer in Manage sales order
entry.content:
Hi, In VA01, if I create a sales order for one-time customer, after entering the customer ID, it will has a pop up window for me to enter address. But in Manage sales orders -version 2, even I have already changed ship-to-party address, it still has error for address. How can I fix this error?

Or it only can create sales order for one-time customer in by VA01?

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Output Parameter Determination - how to get the chanel EMAIL or PRINT
entry.content:
Hi, 
my customer has a problem to get the right channel in the Output Parameter Determination. The request is to get either PRINT or EMAIL as a result. The decision should be made based on the prefered communication channel of the undelying Business Partner.

The fields available in C_BILLINGDOCUMENTOMPARAMDET are not sufficient to achieve this. Adding a field would be an option if the customer would be able to fill it with the needed information.

Any thoughts?

entry.title: Pass Grant ID and Fund to I_JOURNALENTRYTP for posting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have developed an custom application using SAP RAP model in SAP Public Cloud.

How can I pass grant id and fund id to I_JOURNALENTRYTP for posting FI document?

Thank you!

entry.title: TOP-DOWN
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Expenses in the cost place need to be allocated to profitability. Recipient = material, distribution criteria = sales quantity. How should I configure the Sender and Receiver basis? Can you please help me with this in detail.

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Top-Down Distribution Receiver Problem(CO-PA)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am doing the top-down example in J55 scope item exactly. But the system gives an error that it cannot find a receiver. What is the reason for this? Can you please explain in detail how the sender and receiver basis works.

entry.title: #CoE#LAL Cannot create sales order with customer down payment when this order contains free goods.
entry.content: In VA01，Cannot create sales order with customer down payment when this order contains free goods. If this order has contained free goods (TANN), then cannot set the item category to CBAO. Is this the standard setting? Can we change the configuration?

entry.title: Is it possible to maintain WBS element lv 2 to be revenue collector? on SAP S/4Hana Cloud (Grow)
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I need some insight after some tries that i tried on the systems. Appreciate the help!

My first question is that :

Scenarios : 

WBS LV 1 - ABC -------> Profile : Project with revenue

Because the profile is project with revenue, we could generate SO to this level of WBS

WBS LV 2 - ABC - 01 ------> WBS Element

After double checking it grey out the billing element parameter as 'NO' 

- So does it means that we cant assign this WBS element to SO and can only be assigned to order which costs based (PR,PO,ProdO,WO)?

- then because every demand of this project is triggered by WBS LV 2, it means that material stock is locked into that project and another question pops up how can we PGI from this project material to created outbound delivery that generated by SO- WBS LV 1 (because we cant assign SO to WBS LV 2)?

- is it ideal that we need to TP project to Project first to move it from WBS LV 2 to WBS LV 1 and consume to SO?

- and does it means that, every specific WBS only can be 1 collector? either it is as Revenue collector or as a Cost collector?

Here is the attachment for your contexts :

 

This WBS element cannot be assigned. Message no. V2515

 

Appreciate if the PS consultant could give me insights about it, Thanks!

Regards,
Anjastra

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to make a field mandatory in the MIGO transaction in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public?
entry.content:
Dear Experts! I'm working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public and need to configure the MIGO transaction so that the batch field (with external numbering) and its expiration date (SLED/BBD) are mandatory.

 

Is there a way to do this from the standard system configuration, or would additional development be required?

I appreciate any guidance.

entry.title: Is BOM Workflow available in S/4HANA Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
We have a client requirement stating required BOM workflows(L1, L2). I have checked in the system there is no provision to add the BOM workflow.

 

Please suggest, how we can add the workflow?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: External document management system for SAP S4 hana public cloud
entry.content:
Can you please confirm if we can configure  multiple external document management systems for single S4 Hana public cloud application?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Problem viewing the entire structure of technical objects in Asset Viewer App
entry.content:
Hello, 

I cannot view the entire structure of technical objects in the Asset Viewer app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. I can only see the structure that branches from a specific object, but I am unable to visualize the full structure as it would appear in IH01, not just the levels below.

What I am able to see is what you can see in the following image:

In the settings, the number of visible lines I have is 30. I also have assigned the correct roles and catalogs. 

 

Thank you in advance for your response.

entry.title: How to Increase the Number of Rows in a Purchase Order?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In the public cloud "Create Purchase Order-Advanced" app, only three rows of item data are currently displayed.

If the purchase order contains more than three items, I have to scroll up and down to view all the items.

Is there any setting or layout adjustment that allows the PO to display all items at a glance like On Premise version? Thanks.

entry.title: Configuration for the Incoming Supplier Invoices in the E-Document Cockpit for Spain
entry.content:
How to configure the Incoming Invoices from Supplier E-Invoices in E-document cockpit for Spain?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Assign SAP form EDOC_MY_PDF_INVOICE_FORM in eDocument Mayalsia
entry.content:
How to assign EDOC_MY_PDF_INVOICE_FORM in order to display electronic invoices in PDF format?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud中GUI畫面的【調整使用者介面】問題
entry.content:
向各位專家請教關於 S/4HANA Public Cloud中GUI畫面的【調整使用者介面】，我有以下問題：
1. GUI畫面開啟【調整使用者介面】自行調整UI內容後，可以如何同步給其他USER看到？

2. 在【調整使用者介面】中新增的欄位(如下圖紅框)，有辦法將欄位資訊延伸至日記帳分錄文件中嗎？
以及新增的欄位有沒有可能新增至SAP標準API中，讓外部系統寫入銷售發票時，也可運用此新增欄位？

以上再麻煩專家給予回覆或建議，謝謝。

entry.title: Availability in S/4HANA public cloud about KBA 3351929 - Business Partner Extensions for Japan VAT
entry.content:
Hi

Does anyone know if the following Japanese specific field in the supplier master can be added in S/4HANA Public cloud as same as S/4HANA on-premise?

"Japan: Valid Period for Tax Registration available in the tab Vendor: Country Specific Enh. 3.

We use SAP MDG(Master Data Governance) system and replicate business partner master between S/4HANA on-premise and S/4HANA public cloud.
And now there is a request to have the country specific field "Japan: Valid Period for Tax Registration available in the tab Vendor: Country Specific Enh. 3. " in S/4 public could which is available in S/4 on-premise by adopting the following KBA.

3351929 - Business Partner Extensions for Japan VAT

If it is possible, I would appreciate how to make it available in S/4HANA public cloud.

Thank you!

entry.title: inspection lots not created in "Released" status in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
I have maintained an inspection plan for a raw material by uploading it using the migration cockpit. Then, an inspection lot was generated automatically, but it is showing as in 'Created' status ( CRTD CHCR SPRQ ). I maintained the inspection plan, then tried to assign it to the inspection lot, but it is showing 'Inspection plan not assigned.' Initially, the inspection lot was showing the current date, but after I used the 'Task/Specification Assign' option, it changed to a past date. How can I resolve this issue?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Active Ingredient Management in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition.
entry.content:
Hi,

Where can we find information on Active INgredienat Management of products? We manufacture products which have two units of measure  - litres and Litres of absolute alcohol. Each batch manufactured and sold requires both measures. The one is a percentage of the other (LAA is around 96.4% of L)

 

We will need to use these in production, batch management, stcok valuation as well as sales.

 

Many thanks

Rob

entry.title: Issue with Custom Field Data Flowing from Sales Quotation to Sales Order
entry.content:
We got a requirement to Create a Custom field at Sales Quotation Item level and the Value Given at Quotation level should flow to subsequent Sales Order. The field is getting created in both Sales Quotation and Sales Order but the values which entered at Quotation level are not flowing to Sales order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Default G/L account during post goods movement 711 and 712
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

During post goods movements (Migo) for stock adjustment (711 712) it is mandatory to fill in a G/L account. Is it possible to fill somewhere a default G/L account per movement type? I checked automatic account determination app but cannot find an option. And in Manage default account assignment, a default cost center can be add to a cost element.

Regards
